ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the experiment */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the experiment */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost of the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_experiment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_type_id") REFERENCES experiment_types ("experiment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the project */,
  "estimated_duration" TEXT /* Estimated duration of the project */,
  "actual_duration" TEXT /* Actual duration of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_types" (
  "experiment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment type was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment type was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the run belongs to */,
  "run_number" TEXT /* Run number of the experiment */,
  "input_number" INTEGER /* Input number for the run */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the run */,
  "x2" REAL /* Value of X2 parameter */,
  "x1" REAL /* Value of X1 parameter */,
  "u" REAL /* Value of U parameter */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the run */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the run */,
  "estimated_duration" TEXT /* Estimated duration of the run */,
  "actual_duration" TEXT /* Actual duration of the run */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the run */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the run was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment or run */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment or run was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the parameter was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the parameter was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_parameters" (
  "run_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run parameter */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the parameter value belongs to */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter for the run */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the parameter value was set */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the parameter value was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_parameters_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_parameters_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the result belongs to */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result */,
  "result_value" TEXT /* Value of the result */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the result */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the result */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the result was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the result was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the annotation belongs to */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the annotation belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the annotation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., data, report) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the file */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the file was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the file was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_version_by FOREIGN KEY ("version_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id")
)
